idea-plugin.name: CodeAgent
idea-plugin.description:
CodeAgent
Project-aware AI engineering inside JetBrains

Understand the code. Run the work. Review every change.

CodeAgent is a complete agent workspace for IntelliJ IDEA and other JetBrains IDEs. It combines model-driven coding with live project context, visible tool execution, and IDE-native review.

One continuous engineering timeline

  • Live Agent runs with streamed responses, tool-pass progress, approvals, verification, tasks, and durable subagents.
  • ContextEngine with semantic project retrieval and automatic watcher-based incremental indexing.
  • IDE tools for reading, editing, search, terminal, Git, diagnostics, navigation, images, and Mermaid diagrams.
  • Controlled changes with approval policies, post-mutation verification, checkpoints, and native Diff review.

Built for long-running work

Use a 256K model context budget with automatic compaction at 80%, switch models per conversation, keep multiple threads, and inspect backend, model, and ContextEngine connectivity directly from Settings.

Stay in control while CodeAgent does the work.
